description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious outdoor deck area, a swimming pool, and landscaped gardens. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored concrete or stucco, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto the patio and pool area. The front facade includes a covered porch with seating, while the rear showcases an open terrace and greenery. The bungalow is surrounded by wooden decking and has several trees and shrubs integrated into the design. The roof includes a skylight and a prominent chimney, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear zones for relaxation, dining, and recreation.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a pool, wooden decking, and landscaped gardens. Features include a covered porch, open terrace, and integrated greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, landscaped garden, and pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, terrace, and extensive glass windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible chimney, skylight, and minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the open terrace, garden steps, and additional deck space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
